rawCommits.subject: feat(aura3d): scaffold AURA 3D app with three-tab layout
rawCommits.body:
Add new AURA 3D app to the app registry with Box icon at /3d route.
Three-tab studio layout (Imagine/Generate/Tokenize) with stub content,
left nav for asset history, and Zustand store for app state. Adds
three.js dependency for upcoming WebGL 3D model viewer.
rawCommits.cleanSubject: scaffold AURA 3D app with three-tab layout

rawCommits.subject: feat(aura3d): add image generation flow with sidekick panels
rawCommits.body:
Replace tab-based layout with simplified single-page flow: image
generation on top, 3D model section below. Wire SSE image generation
stream with style lock prompt. Add sidekick with Images and Models
tabs for asset management. Model selector follows ChatInputBar
dropdown pattern. Remove old tab stubs (ImagineTab, GenerateTab,
TokenizeTab).
rawCommits.cleanSubject: add image generation flow with sidekick panels

rawCommits.subject: feat(aura3d): add WebGL viewer and 3D generation flow
rawCommits.body:
Create Three.js scene with 4-light rig, GLTF model loader with
auto-center/scale, and WebGLViewer component with full lifecycle
cleanup. Wire 3D generation SSE stream via Tripo. Add viewer
controls for grid, wireframe, and texture toggling. Source image
auto-populates from image generation.
rawCommits.cleanSubject: add WebGL viewer and 3D generation flow

rawCommits.subject: feat(aura3d): add project selector, feature flag, and store tests
rawCommits.body:
Add project selector dropdown to left nav matching ChatInputBar
dropdown pattern. Gate AURA 3D app behind VITE_ENABLE_AURA_3D
feature flag. Add 9 unit tests covering store state transitions,
generation completion, asset selection, and error handling.
rawCommits.cleanSubject: add project selector, feature flag, and store tests

rawCommits.subject: fix(generation): handle upstream SSE frames without event line
rawCommits.body:
The aura-router sends generation events as data-only frames
(data: {"type":"start",...}) without a separate event: line.
The proxy was silently dropping these. Now extracts the type
from the JSON data field when no event line is present.
rawCommits.cleanSubject: handle upstream SSE frames without event line

rawCommits.subject: feat(aura3d): add IMAGE header, lightbox preview, and layout polish
rawCommits.body:
Add IMAGE section title matching 3D MODEL header. Add click-to-expand
lightbox overlay for generated images with backdrop close and X button.
Set 50/50 split between image and model sections. Center empty state
content. Remove unused search placeholder from registry.
rawCommits.cleanSubject: add IMAGE header, lightbox preview, and layout polish

rawCommits.subject: feat(aura3d): switch to tab layout, LeftMenuTree nav, and proxy fix
rawCommits.body:
Replace horizontal split with Image/3D Model tabs per feedback.
Use LeftMenuTree from features/left-menu for left nav consistency
with Projects app. Remove section title headers (tabs replace them).
Fix SSE proxy to extract event type from JSON data field when
upstream omits the event line. Update empty state text.
rawCommits.cleanSubject: switch to tab layout, LeftMenuTree nav, and proxy fix

rawCommits.subject: feat(aura3d): use project tree nav matching Projects app
rawCommits.body:
Replace custom project dropdown with LeftMenuTree showing projects
as expandable groups. Clicking a project expands it and selects it.
Generated images appear as children under the active project. Matches
the Projects app left nav pattern exactly.
rawCommits.cleanSubject: use project tree nav matching Projects app

rawCommits.subject: feat(aura3d): add artifact persistence backend
rawCommits.body:
Add StorageProjectArtifact and CreateProjectArtifactRequest types
to aura-os-storage with client methods for list, create, get, and
delete. Proxy handlers in aura-os-server forward to aura-storage
with JWT auth. Routes at /api/projects/:id/artifacts and
/api/artifacts/:id.
rawCommits.cleanSubject: add artifact persistence backend

rawCommits.subject: feat(aura3d): add artifact persistence to store
rawCommits.body:
Add artifacts API client and wire persistence into the store. On
project select, load artifacts from aura-storage and convert to
store types. Strip style lock suffix from stored prompts for display.
Link images to models via sourceImageId/parentId. Artifact save is
handled by the router — frontend only loads and maps.
rawCommits.cleanSubject: add artifact persistence to store

rawCommits.subject: feat(aura3d): polish nav, sidekick, and viewer controls
rawCommits.body:
Left nav shows images and models with icons under each project,
with prefixed IDs for correct selection dispatch. Sidekick panels
use thumbnail grid for both images and models with section headings.
Viewer controls replaced with icon toggle buttons. Generate 3D
button hidden when model already loaded. Progress messages cycle
during generation. Image preview enlarged and source image
shown full-size.
rawCommits.cleanSubject: polish nav, sidekick, and viewer controls

rawCommits.subject: feat(aura3d): wire parentId chain and require project selection
rawCommits.body:
Capture artifactId from image SSE completed event and pass it as
parentId when generating 3D. Proxy forwards parentId to the router
so model artifacts link to their source image. Disable prompt input
and Generate 3D button when no project is selected.
rawCommits.cleanSubject: wire parentId chain and require project selection

rawCommits.subject: feat(aura3d): remove feature flag, always enable AURA 3D app
rawCommits.body:
Remove VITE_ENABLE_AURA_3D feature flag and isAura3DEnabled check.
AURA 3D is now always visible in the app registry.
rawCommits.cleanSubject: remove feature flag, always enable AURA 3D app

rendered.title: AURA 3D studio lands, GPT-5.5 arrives, and nightly release pipeline hardens
rendered.intro: A big day for Aura: a brand-new AURA 3D app went from scaffold to a polished image-to-3D studio with a Three.js viewer, artifact persistence, and project-scoped history. Alongside it, GPT-5.5 support landed in chat, the nightly release and changelog-media pipelines got meaningfully more resilient, and a lingering SSE proxy bug that silently dropped generation events was fixed.

entries.title: Nightly release pruning and changelog history get failure-tolerant
entries.summary: The nightly release workflow and changelog media pipeline were restructured around retry-safe scripts and a new recovery workflow so transient GitHub failures no longer break publishing.

items.text: Extracted nightly asset pruning into a dedicated retry-aware script and added a sync workflow that reconciles changelog media history from gh-pages after each publish run.
Added a gh-pages republish recovery workflow backed by a retrying commit script, so a failed changelog push can be replayed without hand intervention.
Reworked changelog media publishing to sync into dated history entries and improved framing and readability of the generated proof cards.

media.reason: Entirely release/CI tooling: nightly pruning scripts, recovery workflows, and changelog media pipeline. No user-visible product surface to capture in a screenshot.
reasons: Entirely release/CI tooling: nightly pruning scripts, recovery workflows, and changelog media pipeline. No user-visible product surface to capture in a screenshot.

media.storyTitle: Nightly release pruning and changelog history get failure-tolerant

entries.title: GPT-5.5 support and smarter changelog media proofing
entries.summary: Chat picked up a new top-tier model, and the AI-assisted changelog media pipeline got a structured proofing step to stop requesting screenshots for invisible work.

items.text: Added GPT-5.5 to the model registry and ChatInputBar selector, including benchmark pricing entries and server-side routing.
Server now reports ZERO Pro status alongside usage so downstream clients can reflect entitlement state.
Upgraded the daily changelog generator to prompt version 4 with a dedicated media-inference tool that rejects CI, backend, and refactor entries from being screenshotted.
Branded changelog proof cards were enlarged and screenshot capture tightened to preserve crisp output at publish time.

media.reason: GPT-5.5 addition to the ChatInputBar model selector is a visible product surface provable in one screenshot of the open model dropdown. Other items (ZERO Pro backend reporting, changelog media tooling) are non-visual and excluded.

entries.title: AURA 3D app debuts with image generation and WebGL viewer
entries.summary: A new AURA 3D app landed end-to-end: from empty scaffold to a working image-to-3D flow with a Three.js-powered model viewer, gated behind a feature flag for the initial rollout.

items.text: Scaffolded the AURA 3D app at /3d with a Box-icon entry in the app registry, left nav, Zustand store, and three.js added as a dependency.
Replaced the initial three-tab stub with a single-page image generation flow, SSE streaming with style-lock prompts, and a sidekick panel offering Images and Models tabs for asset management.
Added a Three.js WebGLViewer with a 4-light rig, GLTF loader that auto-centers and scales models, and toggleable grid, wireframe, and texture controls wired to a Tripo 3D generation stream.
Introduced a project selector dropdown and gated the app behind VITE_ENABLE_AURA_3D, with store tests covering generation, asset selection, and error handling.

media.reason: Brand-new AURA 3D app with a WebGL viewer, image generation flow, and sidekick panels is a clearly visible, screenshot-friendly product surface.
reasons: Brand-new AURA 3D app with a WebGL viewer, image generation flow, and sidekick panels is a clearly visible, screenshot-friendly product surface.

entry language points to a visible product surface

media.storyTitle: AURA 3D — Image Generation & WebGL Model Viewer

entries.title: SSE generation proxy no longer drops data-only frames
entries.summary: A quiet failure mode in the generation proxy was fixed: upstream events without an explicit event line are now parsed correctly instead of silently discarded.

items.text: The aura-os-server generation handler now extracts the event type from the JSON data field when the upstream router sends data-only SSE frames, unblocking generation streams that previously stalled.

media.reason: Backend SSE proxy parsing fix in Rust. No visible surface change; success state looks identical to any working stream.
reasons: Backend SSE proxy parsing fix in Rust. No visible surface change; success state looks identical to any working stream.

entry language points to release plumbing rather than a product screen

entries.title: AURA 3D adopts tab layout and Projects-style left nav
entries.summary: Based on early feedback, the 3D app's layout and navigation were reshaped to match the rest of Aura, replacing the horizontal split with tabs and adopting the shared LeftMenuTree.

items.text: Swapped the stacked image/model split for Image and 3D Model tabs, dropping redundant section headers and refreshing the empty state copy.
Replaced the custom project dropdown with LeftMenuTree so projects expand inline and generated images appear as children, mirroring the Projects app exactly.
Added an IMAGE header, a click-to-expand lightbox preview for generated images, and a centered empty state ahead of the tab-layout switch.

media.reason: Layout reshape of AURA 3D: new Image/3D Model tabs, LeftMenuTree-based project nav, IMAGE header, and lightbox preview are all obvious in a single screenshot of the updated workspace.
reasons: Layout reshape of AURA 3D: new Image/3D Model tabs, LeftMenuTree-based project nav, IMAGE header, and lightbox preview are all obvious in a single screenshot of the updated workspace.

entries.title: AURA 3D ships artifact persistence and goes on by default
entries.summary: The 3D app gained a real persistence backend, image-to-model lineage, and polished viewer controls, then had its feature flag removed so every user sees it.

items.text: Added a project artifacts backend in aura-os-storage and aura-os-server with list, create, get, and delete endpoints under /api/projects/:id/artifacts, wired through JWT-authenticated proxy handlers.

Hooked the frontend store up to the artifacts API so selecting a project loads its saved images and models, strips style-lock prompt suffixes for display, and preserves image-to-model lineage via sourceImageId/parentId.

Polished the 3D workspace: left nav shows images and models with icons under each project, sidekick panels use thumbnail grids, viewer controls became icon toggles, and progress messages cycle during generation.
Removed the VITE_ENABLE_AURA_3D feature flag so AURA 3D is always visible in the app registry.

media.reason: Visible polish to AURA 3D: icon-based viewer controls, thumbnail grid sidekick panels, left nav showing images and models under projects, and the app now always enabled. These UI states are provable in one screenshot. Backend artifact endpoints are non-visual but the persisted artifacts showing in nav/sidekick is the visible proof.
reasons: Visible polish to AURA 3D: icon-based viewer controls, thumbnail grid sidekick panels, left nav showing images and models under projects, and the app now always enabled. These UI states are provable in one screenshot. Backend artifact endpoints are non-visual but the persisted artifacts showing in nav/sidekick is the visible proof.

highlights: New AURA 3D app: image generation + Three.js WebGL viewer
Artifact persistence links generated images to 3D models
Nightly release pruning and gh-pages recovery hardened
SSE proxy now handles data-only generation frames
